game_info.title: Hyper Light Drifter
game_info.concept:
Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies. Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16­bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale.

Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

• From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
• Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
• Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
game_info.description: You are a Drifter, a wanderer seeking lost technologies in a hauntingly beautiful ruined world. Plagued by a mysterious illness, you must explore dangerous lands, battle fierce enemies, collect ancient artifacts, and discover powerful upgrades. Navigate through treacherous terrain filled with traps and hostile creatures. Your goal is to survive long enough to find the sacred healing crystals that might cure your affliction. The world is unforgiving - death comes swiftly to the unprepared.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move in four directions
Space: Dash/dodge (consumes energy)
Z: Attack with energy blade (consumes energy)
Shift: Toggle map view
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart from start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and navigation through the ruined world. Verifying that the player can move in all directions, dash effectively, and navigate around basic obstacles without getting stuck. This ensures core locomotion mechanics work properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will systematically explore the map by moving in patterns (left-right, up-down), testing dash mechanics by spacing out dash inputs, and attempting to navigate around walls and obstacles. It will prioritize safe movement over combat.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player can move smoothly in all directions, dash without errors, navigate around obstacles, and explore at least 50% of the accessible map area within 300 frames without getting trapped or encountering movement bugs.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing combat mechanics and enemy interactions. Verifying that the player can effectively attack enemies, that damage is calculated correctly, that energy management works, and that the player can defeat multiple enemies in succession.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will actively seek out enemies, engage them in combat using the attack key, manage energy by timing attacks carefully, and use dash to avoid damage. It will prioritize eliminating enemies while maintaining health above 30%.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Success means defeating at least 5 enemies, taking damage when appropriate, dealing damage correctly, managing energy effectively, and demonstrating that combat mechanics function without errors or freezes.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing collectible gathering and progression systems. Verifying that the player can collect artifacts, that health pickups restore health correctly, that energy crystals recharge energy, and that the score/collection system tracks properly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will prioritize moving toward visible collectibles (health, energy, artifacts), collecting them efficiently, and verifying that the HUD updates correctly. It will seek out at least 10 collectibles of various types.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if the player collects at least 10 items, health and energy are restored correctly, artifacts increase the count, and the UI displays accurate information without visual glitches.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing environmental hazards and trap mechanics. Verifying that spike traps, poison pools, and crumbling platforms damage the player appropriately and that hazard detection works correctly across the map.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI will deliberately navigate into hazardous areas, test spike trap damage, walk through poison pools, and attempt to cross crumbling platforms. It will verify that each hazard type causes appropriate damage.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Success means encountering at least 3 different hazard types, taking damage from each, surviving the encounters, and demonstrating that all environmental hazards function as intended without causing crashes.
TEST_4.description: Testing environmental hazards and trap mechanics. Verifying that spike traps, poison pools, and crumbling platforms damage the player appropriately and that hazard detection works correctly across the map.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing the win condition by collecting all required healing crystals. Verifying that the game correctly tracks crystal collection, updates the objective, and triggers the win state when all crystals are obtained.
TEST_5.strategy_description: The AI will use optimal pathfinding to locate and collect all healing crystals as quickly as possible while avoiding unnecessary combat and hazards. It will prioritize crystal collection above all other objectives.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player collects all healing crystals, the game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state, the victory screen displays correctly, and no errors occur during the win condition check.
TEST_5.description: Testing the win condition by collecting all required healing crystals. Verifying that the game correctly tracks crystal collection, updates the objective, and triggers the win state when all crystals are obtained.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing death and lose conditions. Verifying that the player dies when health reaches zero, that the game over screen appears correctly, and that all death-related mechanics function properly.
TEST_6.strategy_description: The AI will deliberately take damage from enemies and hazards without healing, allowing health to deplete to zero. It will verify the transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state and test that the restart mechanism works.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Success means the player dies when health reaches zero, the game over screen displays with appropriate messaging, and pressing R correctly restarts the game to the start screen.
TEST_6.description: Testing death and lose conditions. Verifying that the player dies when health reaches zero, that the game over screen appears correctly, and that all death-related mechanics function properly.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing the complete gameplay loop from start to finish with optimal play. Verifying that a skilled player can complete the entire game by collecting all crystals while managing resources effectively.
TEST_7.strategy_description: The AI will use advanced pathfinding to navigate efficiently, fight only when necessary, collect strategic power-ups, manage energy carefully, and aim to collect all healing crystals in the minimum time possible.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if the AI completes the game by collecting all healing crystals within 1800 frames (30 seconds), maintaining health above 20%, and demonstrating optimal gameplay without errors.
